CustomField.description: When checked, overrides Day of Month and schedules all future installment Opportunities on the last day of each month. Only applies when Installment Period is Monthly, Quarterly, or a custom period using months.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this box to schedule all future installments on the last day of each month. This overrides the Day of Month value. Only applies to monthly or quarterly installment periods.
CustomField.label: Always use last day of month
